title: Edible Glistering Melon Slice│可食用鑲金西瓜片
description: Glistering Melon Slice is edible and provides therapeutic benefits.│鑲金西瓜片可食用，並具有治療功效。
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components).│該資料包需要伺服器端模組[物品組件](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components)。 ⚠️**
# Function│功能
Glistering Melon Slice is edible and grants 2 Hunger Values, 1.2 Saturation, and 10 seconds of Regeneration I after eating.│鑲金西瓜片可食用，食用後會給予2飢餓值、1.2飽食度以及10秒回復I。
# Precautions│注意事項
- If you install the [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eating-animation-resource-pack), then regardless of whether you install the mod version or the data pack version, you will also need to install an additional resource pack file called "EGMS_is_compatible_with_EA", and move it to the top of all resource packs.│如果你安裝了[食用動畫](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eating-animation-resource-pack)，那麼不論你安裝的是模組版本還是資料包版本，你都需要安裝名為"EGMS_is_compatible_with_EA"的附加資源包檔案，並將其的排序移動到所有資源包的最上方。
